races.description:
Versatile and adaptable creatures, identical to Humans in every way, but born with an innate all-seeing awareness of their surroundings.

The fear of death and the desire to leave a lasting legacy drives many humans to achieve greatness but can also lead to recklessness and greed.

Humans live around [color=244,247,118,255]::elder_age[/color] years.
[color=244,247,118,255]All Statistics +1[/color]
[color=244,247,118,255]360-Degree Vision[/color] - you can see in every direction around you at all times.
races.name: Human (360)
